experiences.title: Attaullah Noor reposted this
experiences.description: At our workplace, it’s never just about work — it’s about people, energy, and the community we build together. Yesterday’s Tekken tournament (after office hours) was a perfect example of that 🔥 Despite a full workday, the turnout, excitement, and involvement were amazing. The matches were intense, the cheers were loud, and the vibe was just right. But what really stood out was the synergy within the group — people supporting each other, enjoying the moment, and creating memories beyond work. This is what truly matters. When a team connects like this outside of work, it naturally reflects in how they collaborate and perform during work. Proud of the culture we’re building — where we don’t just work together, we grow, connect, and have fun together 🙌 And of course, shoutout to Mohib — the OG of Tekken 🏆 Well deserved win! Looking forward to many more such moments 🎮 … more

name: Shaykh Usama
about: Sales Manager at Motive

experiences.title: Shaykh Usama reposted this
experiences.description: Safety can do more than protect your business — it can help drive it forward. Motive is working with Amazon Relay to help carriers turn safer driving into higher earnings through Relay safety rewards. Eligible carriers can receive Amazon’s support with: • Free Motive AI Dashcam hardware • Complimentary professional installation at an Amazon yard • One year of service included • The opportunity to earn between $0.01 and $0.04 extra per collision-free mile With AI-powered safety technology from Motive, carriers can proactively identify risks on the road, coach drivers in real-time, and gain HD video evidence to help protect their business. The goal is simple: help carriers improve safety outcomes while creating opportunities to increase revenue per mile. Whether Relay carriers are new to Motive AI Dashcams or already existing customers, the program is designed to be straightforward and seamless. Learn more about Relay safety rewards with Motive: https://lnkd.in/eaJ4kvUX … more

experiences.title: Danial Faisal reposted this
experiences.description: Google isn’t making a bunch of isolated AI tools. They’re building a connected ‘AI operating system’… …models, design tools, research assistants, video, coding tools, and agents that all talk to each other. That means: • prototypes build 10x faster • true end-to-end AI workflows (not one-off demos) • production-ready agents running on GCP Google quietly built a full-stack ecosystem where everything connects. Here’s what’s already live: - Models: Gemini Flash, Gemini Pro, Gemma - Design: Stitch, Whisk, Imagen - Research: NotebookLM, AI Mode - Video: Veo, Flow, Google Vids - Coding: Gemini CLI, Jules, Antigravity IDE - Agents: ADK, A2A, FileSearch API The best part is: These tools don’t work in isolation. They work together. 👇 Which Google AI tool are you most excited to try first? Save this. Share it. Build on it. ➕ Follow Amit Rawal for more AI educational content. ___________________________________________ 👋 I’m Amit Rawal, an AI practitioner and educator. Outside of work, I’m building SuperchargeLife.ai , a global movement to make AI education accessible and human-centered. ♻️ Repost if you believe AI isn’t about replacing us… It’s about retraining us to think better. Opinions expressed are my own in a personal capacity and do not represent the views, policies, or positions of my employer (currently Google LLC) or its subsidiaries or affiliates. … more

experiences.title: Commercial Sales Manager
experiences.description: Ready to help someone in your network take the next big step in their sales career? We’re hiring New Logo Account Executive roles at Motive in Pakistan! If you (or someone you know) has the grit, energy, and drive to win in outbound, I want to hear from you. We’re hiring for: • SMB Account Executive — Outbound (Pakistan) • CMRL Account Executive — Outbound (Pakistan) What success looks like: • You love building pipeline and owning the full cycle from first touch to close • You’re coachable, resilient, and consistent in activity and follow-through • You thrive in fast-paced, high-output, team-first environments Why this is worth a conversation: • High-impact role with real growth potential • Strong team culture, hands-on coaching, and a clear path to win • Comp structure that rewards performance Know someone who fits? Refer them or DM me. If that’s you, reach out and let’s chat! #hiring #sales #AccountExecutive #OutboundSales #NewLogo #SMB #CMRL #Pakistan #Careers #Motive … more

name: Usman Sohail
about: Senior Sales Manager Enterprise Ext- Franchise @ Motive | Driving Enterprise Sales Growth

experiences.title: Usman Sohail
experiences.description: I am beyond honored to share that I’ve been awarded the 2025 President’s Club at Motive! Reflecting on the past year, this achievement isn't just a personal milestone—it’s a testament to the grit, innovation, and relentless drive of the people I’m lucky enough to work with every day. We set big goals, faced tough challenges, and consistently pushed the boundaries of what’s possible in the fleet management and automation space. A massive thank you to the leadership team for your vision and for fostering a culture where high performance is celebrated: Alex Clark : Thank you for the unwavering support and for setting the bar high. Jamie Mohan: I appreciate your strategic guidance and for always pushing us to think bigger. Cam Coppin: Thank you for the mentorship and for helping me navigate the complexities of this year. To My Team This award has your names all over it. You are the ones in the trenches, doing the hard work, and showing up with passion every single day. Leading this group is the highlight of my career. Your success is my success, and I couldn't be prouder of what we’ve built together. What’s Next? While 2025 was a landmark year, we’re just getting started. I’m energized and ready to take this momentum into the next chapter as we continue to help our customers transform their operations. Onward and upward! 🚀 #Motive #PresidentsClub #SalesLeadership #TopPerformer #WinnersCircle #SalesManager … more
